Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Hey, can we go look at some earrings?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}We didn't end up going last time, remember? I still need to check out what new pieces they have![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}Oh, there you are! You need to stay by Mommy's side, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}He was with his mother today, huh...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 13 7 5 2}Yeah. Kinda looked like he was lost again, so I was worried for a second there...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Nothing... I was just remembering something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I've heard that no matter how careful you try to be, kids just love wandering off on their own...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Especially when they're that young. Must be hard being a mother.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Hmm, none of the earrings caught my eye...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Maybe I should find a new shop to check out. If I go on a day off, I could look somewhere a little further from home.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}But if I go out on my own again, who knows what creeps might come after me...? The news hasn't been very reassuring.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Gee, what should I do? If only someone would come with me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 5 13 7 10 2}Hehe, thanks! I'll treat you to something when we get there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Fine, I'll be blunt. Could you come with me? I'll treat you to something![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Okay, sorry. I'll be real with you. I'd love it if you'd be able to come with me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Haha, so much for being afraid to rely on others, huh? Now it just slips out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I can't ask for too much, but I shouldn't do everything by myself, either...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}I guess it'll all balance out if you start relying on me more, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Oh, right... I wanted to give you something.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}That's actually why I wanted to hang out today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: *Unused message labels. *If this appears, it is a bug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}You know what it is, right? It's the strap from my cell phone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}I got it at the opening ceremony for the Moonlight Bridge.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}It's been my special keepsake for many years...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Because my dad bought it for me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}I used to talk to the little charm attached to it when I was alone in my room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Haha... You must think I'm nuts, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}But it was pretty much the only thing that got me through.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}I can honestly say I wouldn't be here today if it weren't for that little guy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}So I was just thinking, maybe it could help you in some way too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}Yup. I'm doing better these days, so I'd like you to have it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Hey, don't look at me like that! Just accept the gesture, okay? Geez.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can feel the tight bond[n]between me and Yukari...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Соціальний зв'язок «Закохані» досяг максимального рівня! Тепер ви можете створити {f 0 1 35}Кібелу{f 0 1 27} — мати землі![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}Oh, right, so as we were saying... It'd be nice to go someplace a little further from home.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}We've talked about this before, remember? About going out to the mountains or something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}Let's make good on that, okay? We could even go to Destinyland![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}I can't wait to make some more fun memories together![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}All right, well, now that that's decided, it's time to start planning![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}Give some thought to where you'd like to go, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari and I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
